base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of enemies_atlas — a character (enemy_group) from 1991 final fantasy iv. Enemy roster — covers all standard encounters across overworld/dungeon regions. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
